sanitizationNotes: Raw customer names, extra-driver names, street addresses, VINs, masked VIN fragments, and long page text anchors were redacted.
Dynamic ASCPRODUCT and customer-summary IDs were normalized to route-family placeholders where practical.
This bundle is safe for repo evidence review but should still be treated as internal project data.
